main.description: Trust attestation issued by a curator DID about a verified publisher. The rkey is the verified DID. Records authored by anyone other than the configured curator DID are ignored by the registry indexer.

subject.description: DID of the verified publisher. Must match the rkey for tamper resistance.

handle.description: Publisher's atproto handle at the time of verification. Re-issued on handle change.

displayName.description: Display name bound by this verification.
